Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Part D Event (PDE)/Drug Characteristics Codebook │ July 2025 │ V 1.8 1 

Variable Details 

This section of the codebook contains one entry for each variable in the Medicare Part D Event (PDE)/drug characteristics 
files. Each entry contains variable details to facilitate understanding and use of the variables. 

ADJSTMT_DLTN_CD 

LABEL: Adjustment Deletion Code
